title: multiple cache in different order for RUN confuses podman
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

podman build fails if RUN --mount=type=cache,... --mount=...,type=cache is used

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. git checkout https://github.com/distribution/distribution

2. podman build .

**Describe the results you received:**

Podman either crashes or fails:
crash :
```
panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference                                                                                                                                                                       
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x618 pc=0x55fcc205cb21]                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
goroutine 1660 [running]:                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.(*StageExecutor).Copy(0xc000eaa380, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0xc0001a2000, 0x1, 0x1, 0x1, 0xc0010d6880)                                                                                                      
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/podman-4.2.0/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/stage_executor.go:348 +0x41                                                                                                                
github.com/openshift/imagebuilder.(*Builder).Run(0xc0005d5800, 0xc000578c80, 0x55fcc2ae64e0, 0xc000eaa380, 0xc0010dd801, 0xc0005ac601, 0x5)                                                                                                   
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/podman-4.2.0/vendor/github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/builder.go:412 +0x2b6                                                                                                                               
github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.(*StageExecutor).Execute(0xc000eaa380, 0x55fcc2adbaa8, 0xc000dc2960, 0xc00155cc70, 0xb, 0xc000e99687, 0x40, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, ...)                                                                    
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/podman-4.2.0/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/stage_executor.go:1283 +0x1f86                                                                                                             
github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.(*Executor).buildStage(0xc000201200, 0x55fcc2adbaa8, 0xc000dc2960, 0xc001075650, 0xc0005ac640, 0x6, 0x8, 0x5, 0x55fcc2900b60, 0x0, ...)                                                            
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/podman-4.2.0/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/executor.go:502 +0x2cc                                                                                                                     
github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.(*Executor).Build.func3.1(0xc000201200, 0xc0010f70c4, 0xc0010f70d0, 0xc001075650, 0xc0005ac640, 0x6, 0x8, 0x5, 0xc000174300, 0xc001075680, ...)                                                    
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/podman-4.2.0/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/executor.go:806 +0x41e                                                                                                                     
created by github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.(*Executor).Build.func3                                                                                                                                                                 
        /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/podman-4.2.0/vendor/github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/executor.go:778 +0x27c                 
```
if restarting build:
```
[3/6] STEP 8/8: RUN --mount=type=bind,target=/src,rw   --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/go-build   --mount=target=/go/pkg/mod,type=cache   goreleaser-xx --debug     --name="registry"     --dist="/out"     --main="./cmd/registry"    
 --flags="-v"     --ldflags="-s -w -X '$PKG/version.Version={{.Version}}' -X '$PKG/version.Revision={{.Commit}}' -X '$PKG/version.Package=$PKG'"     --tags="$BUILDTAGS"     --files="LICENSE"     --files="README.md"                        
Error: error building at STEP "RUN --mount=type=bind,target=/src,rw --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/go-build --mount=target=/go/pkg/mod,type=cache goreleaser-xx --debug     --name="registry"     --dist="/out"     --main="./cmd/regi
stry"     --flags="-v"     --ldflags="-s -w -X '$PKG/version.Version={{.Version}}' -X '$PKG/version.Revision={{.Commit}}' -X '$PKG/version.Package=$PKG'"     --tags="$BUILDTAGS"     --files="LICENSE"     --files="README.md"": error resolv
ing mountpoints for container "4df716f20284cefda5c8507723d817e911470e286ddaaf0188aa26102fbecba0": invalid mount type        
```
**Describe the results you expected:**

build to complete succesfully

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

If I ensure both mount cache line are in the same order, builds works fine:
replacing
```
  --mount=target=/go/pkg/mod,type=cache \
```
with
```
  --mount=target=type=cache,/go/pkg/mod \
```
fixes the build.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      4.2.0

Go Version:   go1.16.15

```

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body: Hi @fcrozat , Just confirming only changing `--mount=target=/go/pkg/mod,type=cache \` with `--mount=target=type=cache,/go/pkg/mod \` makes it work fine for you ? Cause when i was building i saw more issue like not setting the default type to bind when no type is specified.

Yes, applying the following patch allows to build with --no-cache (to ensure I don't have any leftover):

```
--- a/Dockerfile
+++ b/Dockerfile
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ ARG PKG="github.com/distribution/distribution/v3"
 ARG BUILDTAGS="include_oss include_gcs"
 RUN --mount=type=bind,target=/src,rw \
   --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/go-build \
-  --mount=target=/go/pkg/mod,type=cache \
+  --mount=type=cache,target=/go/pkg/mod \
   goreleaser-xx --debug \
     --name="registry" \
     --dist="/out" \

```
@fcrozat I think order issue must be closed by the PR https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4234
